movies.original_title: ฟัด จัง โตะ
movies.overview: Gob, a product designer who always manages to find something crap to present to his boss and really wants someone who can listen to his problems when he feels down. All he got, however, is Gab, a reckless dancer friend who only likes to talk about herself and order him to do this and that.
movies.tagline: When a lovebird is getting love sick.
movies.title: Love Sick

movies.original_title: เลือดรักนักฆ่า
movies.overview: Hunted for her rare blood type, a caged woman vows to fight alongside the assassin she loves to protect their future when an old enemy resurfaces.
movies.title: My Dearest Assassin

movies.overview: When Malee, a young woman with a dark past, is drawn by fate to an apartment where she must confront haunting memories from her childhood, she encounters Pran, a botanist, a tea blending master, and the founder of a Thai floral tea brand.
movies.tagline: One night, one stain written into a lifetime.
movies.title: The Stain

movies.overview: Born during an ancient village ritual, Panor faces isolation as mysterious misfortunes plague those around her. She must uncover the truth behind the dark curse that has haunted her since birth.
movies.tagline: Get ready for the origin of the art of the devil.
movies.title: Panor

movies.overview: The gay mafia Gang of Cherry is residing at a construction site somewhere in Thailand. One of its most notorious members is Mac aka PlayBoy, a gay male prostitute with an addiction for sm sex. Bipolar Cherry is the gang’s leader. The situation escalates when a shipment of drugs disappears.
movies.title: PlayBoy (and the Gang of Cherry)

movies.overview: A shaman's family learn that their goddess is supposedly controlling one of them. However, their lives take a frightening turn when they realise the goddess has nothing to do with the possession.
movies.tagline: A story about shamanism in Thailand.
movies.title: The Medium

movies.overview: When the head of a statue sacred to a village is stolen, a young martial artist goes to the big city and finds himself taking on the underworld to retrieve it.
movies.tagline: No computer graphics. No stunt doubles. No wires.
movies.title: Ong-Bak

movies.overview: Follows a ruthless hitman who, after narrowly escaping a fatal attempt on his life, betrays his gang in an effort to find forgiveness but ends up becoming a target himself.
movies.tagline: Once a killer, now the mark.
movies.title: Bang

movies.overview: Jan is a boy growing up in 1930s Siam in a wealthy, dysfunctional family where sex has a huge impact on everyone's lives. Jan is viewed by his father as cursed, since his mother died giving birth to him.
movies.title: Jan Dara

movies.original_title: จันดารา ปฐมบท
movies.overview: Jan, a young boy, grows up without a mother and is often insulted by his father. He struggles with his life as he longs to be with several women, even Madame Boonleung, his father's lover.
movies.tagline: A tragedy of lust, love and revenge…
movies.title: Jan Dara: The Beginning

movies.original_title: ชัตเตอร์ กดติดวิญญาณ
movies.overview: When Jane and Tun run over a girl in a car accident, they speed away immediately from the crime scene. However, Tun, a photographer, soon discovers strange shadows in his photos, which unsettles them.
movies.tagline: The most terrifying images are the ones that are real.
movies.title: Shutter

movies.overview: A beautiful teacher is wronged by six of her students. Calling on demons and forces of black magic, she extracts an ultra-gruesome retribution against each of them.
movies.tagline: The Devil never leaves You Alive.
movies.title: Art of the Devil 2

movies.original_title: ฟู้ดทรัค ลัก (รัก) หมูเด้ง
movies.overview: When a child sneaks onto their food truck looking for his father, three friends go on a wild road trip, running into police, monks — and a famous hippo.
movies.tagline: Love is on the menu but every recipe has its secrets.
movies.title: Food Truck: Stolen Love... and Moo Deng

movies.overview: Thailand, 1941 — a handful of Japanese soldiers and their prisoners are trapped in a cursed mine. As tensions between enemies reach a breaking point, they are forced to confront a terrifying, ancient monster lurking in the shadows.
movies.title: Omukade

movies.overview: M, a university dropout low on money and luck, volunteers to take care of his terminally ill grandmother, in the hope of pocketing an inheritance.
movies.tagline: Never underestimate a grandma's love for her family.
movies.title: How to Make Millions Before Grandma Dies

movies.original_title: โกฮัง..หัวใจโกโฮม
movies.overview: The bonds between humans and animals following a stray dog named Gohan as it moves through life with temporary owners over a decade, through good times and bad times, joy and sorrow, hellos and goodbyes.
movies.tagline: One stray dog, three owners, comes the love that lasts fur-ever.
movies.title: Gohan

movies.original_title: กฤษดา พาราไดซ์
movies.overview: A friend who goes missing in an abandoned amusement park sets the friendship of a group of teenagers to a challenge as they encounter conflict and secrets along the way.
movies.tagline: Abandoned water park. Hide and seek, or hide and lost.
movies.title: Kijsada Paradise

movies.overview: A young fighter named Kham must go to Australia to retrieve his stolen elephant. With the help of a Thai-born Australian detective, Kham must take on all comers, including a gang led by an evil woman and her two deadly bodyguards.
movies.title: The Protector

movies.overview: Tien, the son of Lord Sihadecho — a murdered nobleman — is taken under the wing of Chernang, a renowned warrior and leader of the Pha Beek Krut.
movies.title: Ong Bak 2

movies.original_title: เส้นตาย สายลวง
movies.overview: Three women fall prey to a ruthless phone scam. To settle the score, they'll take on the criminal network that stole their money — and their dignity.
movies.tagline: When the victim becomes the hunter. When the law fails it's time to reclaim.
movies.title: The Red Line

tv_shows.overview: When a young attorney is accused of murdering a police officer's son, he teams up with the "Evil Lawyer" to exploit loopholes and prove his innocence.
tv_shows.tagline: Framed for a murder he didn't commit. Forced to trust the law's greatest sinner.

tv_shows.overview: To drive away a persistent admirer, MooMoo interns at his hotel to show off his worst habits, only to find himself falling for the man he hates.

last_episode_to_air.overview: Jun becomes anxious that he isn't doing enough for Sorn, fearing it will affect their marriage prospects. During their anniversary beach trip, he overhears a conversation between Penny and Jun that confirms his fears.

tv_shows.original_name: ไหนเฮียบอกไม่ชอบเด็ก
tv_shows.overview: Jun loves to annoy Sorn. Sorn can't stand Jun. But fate has plans—and maybe feelings—they didn’t see coming.

seasons.name: Specials
seasons.overview: Jun has just started his career while secretly dating Sorn. Sorn takes Jun on a seaside trip and promises to love and take care of him forever.

last_episode_to_air.overview: Sky's ex-boyfriend, Gun, returns to cause problems after he learns that Prapai and Sky are dating.

tv_shows.name: Love In The Air
tv_shows.original_name: บรรยากาศรัก เดอะซีรีส์
tv_shows.overview: Rain plots to make Phayu fall for him to ruin his reputation, while Sky grapples with his feelings for Prapai, in this whirlwind of emotions and growing love.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: When the clouds in the sky and falling rain tease the two close friends in trouble, Rain and Sky, it takes them to meet Payu and Prapai, who are not only cunning saviors, but also guys making a storm in the two best friends' hearts. The war of love is about to take place in the warm spring, hot summer, lonely autumn and cold winter. How would the atmosphere of love be? Which way would their heart wave and the air full of love take them to?

created_by.name: Snow Leopard
created_by.original_name: เสือดาวหิมะ

tv_shows.name: Enemies With Benefits
tv_shows.original_name: ลัลล์ไม่ชอบไวน์
tv_shows.overview: Head of Sales Lal is determined to triumph over Head of Accounting Wine. Wine is her polar opposite and known for her mercilessness. When a wild night leads them to a friends with benefits relationship, they'll do anything to keep it a secret, pretending to be enemies so that absolutely no one at work finds out. Without realising it, however, their newfound closeness begins to give way to love.
tv_shows.tagline: If you have something to say to me, just take it to the bed.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 12
last_episode_to_air.overview: Duang and Qin share a romantic Japan getaway and heartfelt future plans before a full-circle finale at "Freshy Night".

tv_shows.overview: After a festival confession, art student Duang sets out to win over a guarded music major, slowly turning first love into a safe haven for them both.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: A brave confession begins a gentle pursuit where two students become each other’s refuge, healing and growing through love.

tv_shows.tagline: Not the best, But still good.

last_episode_to_air.overview: As suspicion spreads across the farm, Sila stays by Saithan's side while preparing a move against Maenmueang.

seasons.overview: Exiled from home and seeking a fresh start, a man finds solace in Chiang Rai, where a guarded man helps him heal—and teaches him how to love in return.

last_episode_to_air.overview: Love is sealed in laughter and Thai costumes—P and Pan declare every season theirs.

tv_shows.overview: When four boys meet on a Tokyo trip, their lives quietly intertwine—leading to love, growth, and a winter that might bring them back together.

seasons.name: Kiseki in Tokyo Chapter 2
seasons.overview: It's autumn in Tokyo, and when P, a long-time resident, takes his best friend Beboy on a sightseeing tour. They are unexpectedly joined by twins Pan and Plai. The four guys spend time together in the city, making precious memories together.

seasons.name: Season of Love in Shimane
seasons.overview: A year after their fateful trip, P has built a new life—but when Pan returns to Japan with someone new, old feelings stir and winter begins to shift.

tv_shows.tagline: Was it chance that we met? Or is it a miracle?

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 12
last_episode_to_air.overview: Sun risks all to save Mei and Peach—but even victory can’t end the war ahead.

tv_shows.name: Knot
tv_shows.original_name: KNOT
tv_shows.overview: A bond that can’t be untied and a connection that changes everything.

tv_shows.name: Chasing Love
tv_shows.original_name: พี่เองก็ลำบาก
tv_shows.overview:
Song, a hot nerd and food researcher, arranged a one-night stand with a mysterious woman under a strict condition: no strings attached. However, the other party broke the terms, asking for an emotional connection. Song ended the steamy encounter and walked away.

But the world really is round. That woman turned out to be Piangrawin—the daughter of the president of the company where Song worked. And Piangrawin wasn’t letting go easily. She pursued her with puppy-like devotion, entangling Song's heart and routine with reckless charm. She even claimed she’d already named their future child.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 12
last_episode_to_air.overview: Khemjira faces his final battle against Ramphueng as dawn decides whether he lives or dies.

tv_shows.name: Khemjira
tv_shows.original_name: เขมจิราต้องรอด
tv_shows.overview: With a deadly curse set to claim him at 21, a young man flees to a master of ancient magic—only to face ghosts more dangerous than his fate.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: With a deadly curse set to claim him at 21, a young man flees to a master of ancient magic—only to face ghosts more dangerous than his fate.

tv_shows.tagline: Do you believe in things you cannot see?

last_episode_to_air.name: Lately, It's Winter Season 5
last_episode_to_air.overview: Faced with losing Nao, Tiger agrees to leave for Hong Kong, hoping to return as someone worthy of protecting him.

tv_shows.name: Fourever You
tv_shows.original_name: เพราะรักนำทาง
tv_shows.overview: Four friends navigate college life and chaotic romances as they each find their hearts entangled with medical students across four unique stories.

seasons.name: Specials
seasons.overview: A "special" love story that continues the sweetness of "Fourever You", following Johan and North as they take the next step in a relationship that has grown beyond just being like brothers.

seasons.name: Part One
seasons.overview: Easter joins a northern Thai university to escape his past but reunites with his ex, Hill. Meanwhile, his roommate North faces chaos with his flirty creditor.

seasons.name: Part Two
seasons.overview: Three friends navigate painful secrets, spiritual mysteries, and lonely hearts as they find love with medical students against all odds

tv_shows.name: Fulfill
tv_shows.original_name: รักเติมเต็ม
tv_shows.overview: From college sweethearts to lifelong partners, Pafun and Aioon build a loving, devoted life together—dreaming of a family that seems just out of reach. When Pafun’s longing for motherhood deepens, their hope grows around the promise of adopting a child someday. Everything changes when their best friend, Nubnueng, returns unexpectedly and brings a life-altering opportunity. As love, loss, and responsibility collide, the couple must navigate heartbreak, resilience, and the challenges of becoming new parents. Fulfill is a tender, emotional journey that celebrates chosen family and the power of love to complete what life leaves unfinished.

tv_shows.name: Pen Tor
tv_shows.original_name: เป็นต่อ
tv_shows.overview: A successful man at a publishing company tries to rekindle his romance with an ex-girlfriend as those around him also search for love amidst conflict.

last_episode_to_air.name: Finding the Past, Never to Part
last_episode_to_air.overview: Nakun works at a café with reborn souls and convinces Tinnaphop, who shares Phop's face, to visit Ayutthaya to trigger his past memories.

tv_shows.name: Love Upon a Time
tv_shows.original_name: ภพเธอ
tv_shows.overview: A modern man is transported 400 years into the past, where he must pose as a missing criminal's son while falling for a suspicious noble.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: A modern man is transported 400 years into the past, where he must pose as a missing criminal’s son while falling for a suspicious noble.

tv_shows.tagline: A cruel twist of fate that takes the 'cruel' part too seriously!
